name: noola-monorepo
description: Noola — an AI-native, self-hosted customer-support platform. Monorepo: api (Node/Fastify + Bun), edge (Elixir/Phoenix), embedder (Node), runner (Go), web (Vite/React).

scripts.install:all: cd api && bun install && cd ../web && npm install && cd ../embedder && npm install
